title: Close the Conditional GO remediation cycle and remove the execution plan
outOfScope: Changing any published release asset or immutable tag
Changing repository review or release policy

sources.reason: Prior release evidence is preserved and referenced, not modified.

problemStatement: The remediation cycle is complete and v0.5.30 is published, but the archived release summary still reflects prepublication status and the temporary execution plan remains in the product branch.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: All preceding Work Items are archived, merged, and lifecycle-closed.
evidence: make ai-close-work-item for preceding Work Items

scenarioCoverage.scenario: v0.5.30 is publicly published for the exact immutable source SHA and its assets pass the public checker.
The plan document is deleted while archived evidence remains available.

riskAssessment.reason: This Work Item deletes a plan document but must preserve all archived audit evidence.

executionDecision.reason: The maintainer authorized the complete cycle and v0.5.30 publication.

preReviewWarnings: Do not delete archived Contracts, Summaries, or archive index entries.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record publication evidence before removing the temporary plan.

acceptance: All ten preceding Work Items remain archived with merged PRs and lifecycle closure evidence.
The archived publish_next_version Summary records v0.5.30, its exact source SHA, release URL, asset digests, and public checker result.
The remediation plan Markdown is deleted and archived evidence paths remain indexed and readable.
guidelines: Preserve immutable release evidence and historical Work Item records.
Do not claim trusted release status beyond the recorded platform evidence.
Run the repository quality and governance checks after cleanup.

intent.problem: Close the serialized remediation cycle without losing audit evidence.
intent.rationale: The plan is an execution artifact; the archived Work Item records and release evidence are the durable audit record.

approvalEvidence.reason: User explicitly authorized deletion of the completed work document after all tasks finish.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized completion and deletion of the work document after all tasks finish.

rollbackNote: The archived evidence is preserved; if the cleanup requires correction, restore the plan from the merged history rather than rewriting release evidence.
